title: laurus azorica var. longifolia
intro: Laurus azorica var. longifolia, also known as the Azores laurustinus, is a variety of the Laurus azorica plant, a flowering evergreen shrub native to the Azores Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Laurus azorica var. longifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems.
